meta.description: Source of truth for all AthleteLab fields, Supabase columns, and rtmlib/MMPose pipeline alignment.
meta.schema_note: All node tab data is stored as JSONB columns inside athlete_lab_nodes. There are no separate tables for metrics, phases, videos, mechanics, or errors. The supabase_column values reflect the JSONB path within athlete_lab_nodes.

changelog.1.1.0: Corrected JSONB column paths to reflect actual schema
changelog.1.2.0: Added Scoring (3), Errors (3), Reference (4), Training Status (4), Admin Enhancements (8) — 58 fields
changelog.1.3.0: Added Camera (7), Checkpoints (8), LLM Prompt additions (3), Badges (8) — 84 fields total

status_legend.implemented: Field is built and functional in AthleteLab UI
status_legend.in_progress: Field is partially built or planned in current sprint
status_legend.not_built: Field is designed but not yet implemented
status_legend.column_exists: Column exists in Supabase with correct type
status_legend.needs_migration: Column is designed but migration not yet run
status_legend.direct_mapping: Field value passed directly to or read directly from rtmlib output
status_legend.indirect_mapping: Field influences rtmlib output processing but does not interact directly
status_legend.llm_only: Field goes to Claude API only, no rtmlib interaction
status_legend.not_applicable: Field has no MMPose/rtmlib relationship by design

mmpose_categories.direct: Passed directly to rtmlib as parameter or read directly from rtmlib keypoints/scores output
mmpose_categories.indirect: Controls how rtmlib output is processed — frame windowing, aggregation, filtering
mmpose_categories.llm: Passed to Claude API as context for feedback generation
mmpose_categories.ui: UI display, navigation, or athlete-facing content only

fields.label: Route / Skill Name
fields.description: The athlete-facing name of the skill. Appears in the training feed, results UI, and LLM feedback.
fields.notes: Under 4 words recommended. Sport-specific vocabulary.

fields.label: Icon / Visual Diagram
fields.description: SVG or image URL for the skill icon. Displayed in the node list sidebar and athlete app.
fields.notes: Should be a clear diagram showing the route or movement pattern.

fields.label: Clip Duration — Minimum
fields.rtmlib_reference: Edge Function pre-flight validation — rejects upload before sending to Cloud Run if clip duration is outside bounds
fields.description: Minimum acceptable video duration in seconds.
fields.notes: Prevents insufficient footage from producing unreliable keypoint data.

fields.label: Clip Duration — Maximum
fields.rtmlib_reference: Edge Function pre-flight validation — prevents full practice session uploads from reaching Cloud Run
fields.description: Maximum acceptable video duration in seconds.
fields.notes: Set tight enough to reject accidental full-session recordings.

fields.label: Node Status (Draft / Live)
fields.rtmlib_reference: Supabase Database Webhook only fires analysis pipeline when status = 'live'.
fields.description: Controls whether athlete uploads trigger automatic analysis.
fields.notes: Node cannot be set to Live unless all completeness checks pass.

fields.label: Node Version
fields.rtmlib_reference: Stored on athlete_lab_results alongside analysis output. Allows results to be traced to exact node config.
fields.description: Auto-incremented integer. Increments on every SAVE when node is Live.
fields.notes: Ensures historical results remain accurate even when node config is updated.

fields.label: Video — Descriptive Label
fields.description: Admin-facing and athlete-facing label for this video.
fields.notes: Stored in elite_videos JSONB array.

fields.label: Video URL
fields.rtmlib_reference: Passed to Cloud Run rtmlib service. yt-dlp downloads clip using this URL before frame extraction.
fields.description: YouTube URL for the reference video.
fields.notes: Stored in elite_videos JSONB array.

fields.label: Clip Window — Start
fields.rtmlib_reference: Passed to Cloud Run as clip extraction parameter. rtmlib only processes frames within this window.
fields.description: Start timestamp in seconds for the relevant skill execution.
fields.notes: Without this, rtmlib processes the entire video.

fields.label: Clip Window — End
fields.rtmlib_reference: Paired with start_seconds to define the exact frame range sent to rtmlib.
fields.description: End timestamp in seconds for the relevant skill execution.
fields.notes: Duration must fall within Basics tab clip_duration_min and clip_duration_max.

fields.label: Camera Angle
fields.rtmlib_reference: Used by Edge Function to select correct Reference tab scale calibration for pixel-to-yard conversion.
fields.description: Camera angle this video was filmed from. Options: Sideline, Endzone, Behind QB.
fields.notes: Must match a Reference tab calibration entry for Distance metrics.

fields.label: Video Type
fields.description: Classification of video purpose. Educational / Analysis / Both.
fields.notes: Does not affect rtmlib processing.

fields.label: Reference Video Flag
fields.description: Marks this video as the elite benchmark shown to athletes. One per node.
fields.notes: Only one video object per node can have is_reference = true.

fields.label: Skill Overview
fields.description: Athlete-facing description of the skill. Shown before the athlete films.
fields.notes: 2-3 sentences max. Written for athletes aged 14-22.

fields.label: Phase Name
fields.rtmlib_reference: Phase names link metric phase_id assignments. Pipeline evaluates each metric only within its assigned phase frame window.
fields.description: Name of this movement phase. Must be unique within the node.
fields.notes: Stored in phase_breakdown JSONB array.

fields.label: % of Clip
fields.rtmlib_reference: Directly controls frame window boundaries. Pipeline divides total extracted frames proportionally.
fields.description: Percentage of the total clip this phase occupies. All phase weights must sum to exactly 100.
fields.notes: Incorrect weights cause metrics to be evaluated on wrong frames.

fields.label: Phase Description
fields.description: Brief description of what happens in this phase.

fields.label: Frame Buffer
fields.rtmlib_reference: Instructs metric calculation layer to include N additional frames on either side of each phase boundary.
fields.description: Number of frames to overlap on phase boundaries. Default 3.
fields.notes: Without frame buffer, events at phase boundaries may be missed.

fields.label: Segmentation Method
fields.rtmlib_reference: Determines how Edge Function divides frames before passing to metric calculation layer.
fields.description: How video frames are divided into phase windows. Proportional or Checkpoint-triggered.
fields.notes: Stored as scalar text column on athlete_lab_nodes.

fields.label: Coaching Cues
fields.description: Phase-level coaching instruction passed to Claude API as context for feedback generation.
fields.notes: Stored as single text column on athlete_lab_nodes.

fields.label: Phase Link
fields.description: Links each mechanics section to a specific phase.
fields.notes: Linked by ID — phase renames propagate automatically.

fields.label: Metric Name
fields.description: Athlete-facing label for this measurement.
fields.notes: Under 4 words. Sport-accurate vocabulary.

fields.label: Unit
fields.rtmlib_reference: Must match calculation type: Angle=degrees, Distance=yards, Velocity=mph, Acceleration=mph/s, Frame Delta=frames.
fields.description: Unit of measurement displayed alongside calculated values.
fields.notes: Mismatch between unit and calculation type produces misleading results.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Passed to Claude API alongside metric results. Explains football significance.
fields.notes: 2-3 sentences. Football significance not technical calculation.

fields.label: Elite Target
fields.rtmlib_reference: Scoring engine compares rtmlib calculated value against this target.
fields.description: Benchmark value representing elite-level performance.
fields.notes: Stored as eliteTarget (camelCase) in key_metrics JSONB array.

fields.label: Tolerance
fields.rtmlib_reference: Scoring engine applies tolerance as acceptable deviation band around elite_target.
fields.description: Acceptable deviation from elite target before scoring penalties apply.
fields.notes: Angle ±2-5°, Distance ±0.3-0.7 yards, Velocity ±1-2 mph.

fields.label: Weight (%)
fields.rtmlib_reference: Scoring engine multiplies each metric score by weight/100 and sums to produce aggregate Mastery Score.
fields.description: Percentage contribution to overall Mastery Score.
fields.notes: Min 5%, max 30%. All weights must sum to exactly 100.

fields.label: Temporal Window
fields.rtmlib_reference: Controls how many consecutive frames rtmlib output is aggregated across. Velocity min 3, Acceleration min 5, Frame Delta min 10.
fields.description: Number of consecutive frames the calculation is applied across.
fields.notes: Never set to 1 for Velocity, Acceleration, or Frame Delta.

fields.label: Depends On
fields.rtmlib_reference: Edge Function checks upstream metric status. If upstream flagged, this metric is skipped.
fields.description: Optional dependency on another metric.
fields.notes: Example: YAC Burst depends on Catch Efficiency.

fields.label: Keypoint Indices
fields.rtmlib_reference: CRITICAL. Exact array indices used to extract coordinates from rtmlib output: keypoints[person][index] = [x,y].
fields.description: Array of keypoint index numbers from COCO-WholeBody schema.
fields.notes: Auto-populated from Keypoint Selector UI.

fields.label: Calculation Type
fields.rtmlib_reference: Determines mathematical operation applied to extracted keypoint coordinates from rtmlib output.
fields.description: One of: angle, distance, velocity, acceleration, frame_delta.
fields.notes: Must be compatible with keypoint count and temporal window.

fields.label: Bilateral
fields.rtmlib_reference: Auto mode reads rtmlib confidence scores per frame to determine active side.
fields.description: Controls whether left-side, right-side, or auto-detected keypoints are used.
fields.notes: Auto-detect recommended for all route metrics.

fields.label: Confidence Threshold
fields.rtmlib_reference: Read against scores[person][keypoint_index]. If any keypoint falls below threshold, metric is flagged.
fields.description: Minimum rtmlib confidence score for keypoint coordinates to be considered reliable.
fields.notes: Default 0.70. Never below 0.50. Use 0.75-0.80 for metrics above 15% weight.

fields.label: Phase Assignment
fields.rtmlib_reference: CRITICAL. Determines which frame window rtmlib output is extracted from for this metric.
fields.description: Links this metric to a specific phase.
fields.notes: Linked by phase ID. Renames propagate. Deletion triggers orphan warning.

fields.label: Body Group Filter
fields.rtmlib_reference: Determines which rtmlib Solution class is required. Hands require Wholebody. Feet require Body_with_feet minimum.
fields.description: Which keypoint groups are used in this metric.
fields.notes: UI filter only — actual keypoints determined by keypoint_indices array.

fields.label: Low Confidence Handling
fields.rtmlib_reference: Applied by scoring engine when metric keypoints fall below confidence_threshold. Skip=exclude, Penalize=score at 0, Flag=mark.
fields.description: Node-level rule for handling metrics whose keypoints fall below confidence threshold.
fields.notes: Skip recommended.

fields.label: Minimum Metrics Threshold
fields.rtmlib_reference: Edge Function checks this before writing results. If flagged metric % exceeds threshold, analysis is rejected.
fields.description: If more than this % of metrics are low confidence, reject analysis entirely.
fields.notes: Default 50%.

fields.label: Score Band Labels
fields.description: Human-readable labels for score ranges shown to athletes.
fields.notes: 90-100=Elite, 75-89=Varsity Ready, 60-74=Developing, below 60=Needs Work.

fields.label: Error Name
fields.description: Name of this common mistake. Passed to Claude as a detected or potential error.
fields.notes: Stored in common_errors JSONB array.

fields.label: Error Severity
fields.description: How prominently this error appears in athlete feedback.
fields.notes: Options: critical, common, minor.

fields.label: Auto-Detection Condition
fields.rtmlib_reference: Edge Function evaluates this condition against metric results. Confirmed detections passed to Claude as observed facts.
fields.description: Metric-based trigger condition. Format: [Metric Name] [operator] [value].
fields.notes: e.g. 'Break Angle > 52'.

fields.label: Auto-Detectable Toggle
fields.rtmlib_reference: When true, Edge Function evaluates auto_detection_condition against metric output.
fields.description: Whether the pipeline automatically evaluates the detection condition.
fields.notes: Auto-switches to ON when auto_detection_condition is filled in.

fields.label: Reference Calibrations
fields.rtmlib_reference: pixels_per_yard value applied to all Distance and Velocity metric outputs from rtmlib.
fields.description: Array of calibration objects, one per camera angle.
fields.notes: Not required for Wholebody3d nodes.

fields.label: Pixels Per Yard
fields.rtmlib_reference: CRITICAL for Distance and Velocity metrics. pixel_distance / pixels_per_yard = yards.
fields.description: Number of pixels that equal one yard. Calculated from test footage.
fields.notes: Count pixels across reference object, divide by known size in yards.

fields.label: Athlete Filming Instructions
fields.description: Instructions shown to athletes explaining reference object placement.
fields.notes: Be specific — vague instructions produce inconsistent calibration.

fields.label: If No Reference Detected
fields.rtmlib_reference: Edge Function applies this rule when pixels_per_yard cannot be determined.
fields.description: What the pipeline does if no reference calibration is available.
fields.notes: Options: pixel_units_with_warning, disable_distance_metrics, estimate_using_field_lines.

fields.label: Minimum FPS
fields.rtmlib_reference: FPS affects Velocity and Acceleration calculation accuracy. displacement_per_frame / (1/fps) = velocity. Lower FPS = less precise velocity.
fields.description: Minimum frames per second required for accurate metric calculations.
fields.notes: 30fps minimum. 60fps recommended for break angle and plant foot metrics.

fields.label: Minimum Resolution
fields.rtmlib_reference: rtmlib model input is 384x288. Source video below 720p provides insufficient detail for reliable keypoint extraction.
fields.description: Minimum source video resolution for reliable keypoint detection.
fields.notes: 720p minimum. 1080p recommended.

fields.label: Recommended Distance — Minimum
fields.rtmlib_reference: Too close = full body parts leave the frame. Auto-reject fires if athlete occupies less than threshold % of frame.
fields.description: Minimum recommended camera distance from athlete in yards.
fields.notes: Route running nodes: 10-20 yards sideline.

fields.label: Recommended Distance — Maximum
fields.rtmlib_reference: Too far = athlete occupies less than 15% of frame — triggers auto-reject and keypoint accuracy degrades.
fields.description: Maximum recommended camera distance from athlete in yards.
fields.notes: Athlete should occupy 20-60% of frame height.

fields.label: Auto-Reject: Athlete Too Small
fields.rtmlib_reference: Edge Function checks athlete frame occupancy before sending to Cloud Run. Below threshold = rejected before rtmlib runs.
fields.description: Reject if athlete occupies less than this % of frame height.
fields.notes: Default 15%. Below this hand and foot keypoints return near-zero confidence.

fields.label: Auto-Reject: Keypoint Confidence
fields.rtmlib_reference: Evaluated against average rtmlib confidence scores for required keypoints. Below threshold = analysis rejected before scoring.
fields.description: Reject if average confidence across required keypoints is below this threshold.
fields.notes: Set lower than your lowest per-metric confidence threshold. Default 0.65.

fields.label: Athlete Filming Instructions
fields.description: Step-by-step filming instructions shown to athletes in the upload flow.
fields.notes: Specific instructions reduce rejected uploads and improve keypoint quality.

fields.label: Checkpoint Name
fields.description: Short scannable name for this checkpoint. e.g. 'Plant Foot Strike', 'Head Snap Moment'.
fields.notes: Stored in form_checkpoints JSONB array.

fields.label: Checkpoint Description
fields.description: What this checkpoint is detecting and why it matters. Used as LLM context when checkpoint fires.

fields.label: Phase Assignment
fields.rtmlib_reference: Pipeline only looks for this checkpoint's trigger condition within the assigned phase frame window.
fields.description: Which phase this checkpoint is evaluated within.
fields.notes: Linked by phase_id. Renames propagate automatically.

fields.label: Phase Transition Role
fields.rtmlib_reference: When segmentation_method = checkpoint_triggered, this determines whether the checkpoint firing marks a phase start or end boundary.
fields.description: Whether this checkpoint marks a phase start, phase end, or is informational only.
fields.notes: Options: marks_phase_start, marks_phase_end, informational.

fields.label: Trigger Condition
fields.rtmlib_reference: Edge Function evaluates this condition frame-by-frame within assigned phase using rtmlib keypoint coordinates.
fields.description: Body position event that fires this checkpoint. e.g. 'Left Heel (19) Y-coordinate reaches minimum value'.
fields.notes: Format: [Keypoint name] [condition type] [value].

fields.label: Required Keypoints
fields.rtmlib_reference: Checked against rtmlib scores[person][index]. If any required keypoint falls below confidence threshold, checkpoint is flagged as undetectable.
fields.description: Keypoint indices that must be above confidence threshold for checkpoint to be valid.
fields.notes: Uses same chip selector interface as Metrics tab.

fields.label: Confidence Threshold
fields.rtmlib_reference: Read against rtmlib scores[person][keypoint_index] for required keypoints. Higher default than metrics (0.75 vs 0.70) because checkpoints are binary pass/fail.
fields.description: Minimum rtmlib confidence for required keypoints. Default 0.75 (higher than metrics).
fields.notes: Binary pass/fail events require higher confidence than continuous metric calculations.

fields.label: Priority
fields.rtmlib_reference: Edge Function uses priority to resolve conflicts when two checkpoints fire on the same frame. Lower number = higher priority.
fields.description: Evaluation precedence when two checkpoints fire simultaneously. Priority 1 = highest.
fields.notes: Lower number = higher priority.

fields.label: LLM Prompt Template
fields.description: Template passed to Claude API with all metric results injected as variables.
fields.notes: Variables: {{mastery_score}}, {{phase_scores}}, {{metric_results}}, {{confidence_flags}}, {{detected_errors}}, {{athlete_name}}, {{node_name}}

fields.label: Tone
fields.description: Default communication style for Claude feedback. Options: encouraging, direct, technical.
fields.notes: Adjusts Claude's vocabulary and framing without rewriting the full prompt.

fields.label: Max Feedback Length
fields.description: Target word count for Claude's coaching feedback response.
fields.notes: 50-200 words recommended. Above 350 may overwhelm athletes.

fields.label: System Instructions
fields.description: Persona and context statement prepended to every Claude call. Sets coaching voice before prompt template runs.
fields.notes: Keep under 100 words. e.g. 'You are an NFL wide receivers coach with 15 years experience.'

fields.label: Solution Class
fields.rtmlib_reference: CRITICAL. Determines which rtmlib Solution class is instantiated on Cloud Run. Mismatch returns empty arrays silently.
fields.description: rtmlib model tier. Body (0-16), Body_with_feet (0-22), Wholebody (0-132 2D), Wholebody3d (0-132 3D).
fields.notes: Slant Route requires Wholebody for hand keypoints 99 and 120.

fields.label: Performance Mode
fields.rtmlib_reference: Passed directly to rtmlib PoseTracker mode parameter. Controls which ONNX model weights are loaded.
fields.description: Speed/accuracy tradeoff. Performance=most accurate, Balanced=recommended, Lightweight=fastest.
fields.notes: Use Balanced for all standard route running nodes.

fields.label: Detection Frequency
fields.rtmlib_reference: Passed to rtmlib PoseTracker det_frequency parameter. Full YOLOX detection every N frames, tracks between.
fields.description: How often rtmlib runs full person detection vs tracking.
fields.notes: Default 7. Use 3-5 for clips under 5 seconds.

fields.label: Tracking
fields.rtmlib_reference: Passed to rtmlib PoseTracker tracking parameter. Must be False for Wholebody3d.
fields.description: Whether rtmlib tracks person identity between detection frames.
fields.notes: Auto-set to OFF when Wholebody3d selected.

fields.label: Badge Name
fields.description: Athlete-facing badge title. e.g. 'Route Technician', 'Plant Foot Master'.
fields.notes: Stored in badges JSONB array on athlete_lab_nodes.

fields.label: Badge Icon
fields.description: Emoji or icon displayed alongside the badge on athlete profile and results screen.

fields.label: Badge Description
fields.description: Short motivational line shown to athlete when they earn or view this badge.
fields.notes: Keep under 15 words.

fields.label: Rarity / Tier
fields.description: Difficulty tier affecting visual presentation. Options: common, rare, epic, legendary.
fields.notes: Common=grey, Rare=blue, Epic=purple, Legendary=amber/gold.

fields.label: Unlock Condition Type
fields.description: How the pipeline determines when to award this badge. Options: score_based, metric_based, streak_based, custom.
fields.notes: Evaluated by Edge Function after each analysis against athlete_lab_results.

fields.label: Condition Threshold
fields.description: The score or metric value threshold for unlocking this badge.
fields.notes: e.g. 90 for score_based, 45 for metric_based Break Angle.

fields.label: Required Count / Streak
fields.description: Number of analyses that must meet the condition. For streak_based, must be consecutive.
fields.notes: Default 1 (single achievement). Use 3-5 for rare/epic badges.

fields.label: Condition Metric
fields.description: For metric_based conditions — which metric must meet the threshold.
fields.notes: Populated from node's key_metrics. Null for score_based and streak_based.

fields.label: Enhancement Title
fields.description: Short descriptive name for the enhancement.
fields.notes: Stored in admin_enhancements table.

fields.label: Enhancement Tab
fields.description: Which AthleteLab tab this enhancement applies to.

fields.label: Urgency Level
fields.description: Priority level: critical, high, medium, or future.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: What this enhancement does and why it matters.

fields.label: Reason for Enhancement
fields.description: Why this enhancement is needed.

fields.label: Lovable Prompt
fields.description: Optional Lovable prompt ready to paste when enhancement is scheduled.
fields.notes: Copyable from Enhancements tab with one click.

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Additional context or follow-up thoughts.
